description: Test queries for US-05: Graceful Edge Case Handling - Input Validation
usage: Use these queries to test the input validator with curl, Postman, or the automated test scripts

VALID_QUERIES.description: These queries should PASS validation and be processed normally
VALID_QUERIES.expected_response: validation_status: passed, intent classification, answer from knowledge base

tests.query: How do I submit a data request?
tests.description: Standard FAQ question about data requests

tests.query: What is the form check process?
When will my request be approved?
Can I download the data after approval?
What are the eligibility requirements?
How do I add a study that's not listed?
What's the status of request REQ-12345?
I don't understand what's required. Can you help?
Is there a deadline for submission? When do I need to act?
What does AIML policy mean in the context of data requests?
How can I contact the Vivli team for support?
Tell me about the data sharing process and timeline.
What documents do I need to submit?
Is my research eligible for this platform?
How long does the approval process typically take?
hi
hello
help
support
info

INVALID_BLANK.description: Empty or whitespace-only messages - should FAIL validation
INVALID_BLANK.expected_response: validation_status: failed, error_message: 'I'm sorry, but I couldn't understand your question'

INVALID_TOO_LONG.description: Messages with 500+ words - should FAIL validation
INVALID_TOO_LONG.expected_response: validation_status: failed, error_message: 'Your message is too long. Please break it into smaller questions.'

tests.query: word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word word
tests.description: Extremely long message (500+ words of repetition)

INVALID_HTML.description: HTML/code injection attempts - should FAIL validation
INVALID_HTML.expected_response: validation_status: failed, error_message: 'I'm sorry, but I couldn't understand your question'

tests.query: <script>alert('xss')</script>
Check this <button onclick='alert()'>button</button>
<!DOCTYPE html><html><body>Hacked</body></html>
Click me

Tell me

something

about data

INVALID_CODE.expected_response: validation_status: failed, error_message: 'I'm sorry, but I couldn't understand your question'

tests.query: def my_function(): pass
function test() { return true; }

```python
def hello():
    print('world')
```
public class Main { public static void main(String[] args) {} }
#include <stdio.h> int main() { return 0; }
import requests How do I import data?
tests.description: Python import statement mixed with text

INVALID_SPAM.expected_response: validation_status: failed, error_message: 'I'm sorry, but I couldn't understand your question'

tests.query: Click here http://malicious-site.com and check this https://another-bad-site.com for amazing deals
Buy now! Click here for free offer and get discount today!
Check out http://example.com and http://test.com and http://demo.com
Free offer http://site1.com click here and visit http://site2.com now!

INVALID_NON_ENGLISH.expected_response: validation_status: failed, error_message: 'Please ask your question in English.'

tests.query: 你好，我想提交数据请求
こんにちは、データリクエストを提出したいのですが
안녕하세요 데이터 요청을 제출하고 싶습니다
مرحبا كيف يمكنني تقديم طلب بيانات

INVALID_EMOJIS_ONLY.expected_response: validation_status: failed, error_message: 'I'm sorry, but I couldn't understand your question'

INVALID_SPECIAL_CHARS.description: Special characters only - should FAIL validation
INVALID_SPECIAL_CHARS.expected_response: validation_status: failed, error_message: 'I'm sorry, but I couldn't understand your question'

EDGE_CASES.description: Edge cases that should PASS validation

tests.query: What is the cost? (USD)
tests.description: Text with special characters in parentheses

tests.query: Can I request REQ-123456 or REQ-789?
tests.description: Message with request IDs and hyphens

tests.query: What's the difference between form check and review?
Is it 100% safe? What about 50% cases?
[REDACTED_EMAIL_ADDRESS_2] - Is this email format correct?
Can I use my email address to register?
How many requests can I submit at once?
Do you support data formats like CSV, JSON, and XML?
What's the maximum file size allowed for uploads?
Are there any restrictions on the type of data I can request?

statistics.notes: INVALID_TOO_SHORT removed - MIN_MESSAGE_LENGTH changed to 1 to allow single-word greetings like 'hi', 'hello', 'help'
